hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path outputs | Out-Null; Add-Content -Path outputs/hook-log.txt -Value ('{0}  Write/Edit' -f (Get-Date -Format o))"
powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path outputs | Out-Null; Add-Content -Path outputs/commands-log.txt -Value ('{0}  Bash' -f (Get-Date -Format o))"
